input.command:
cat > /tmp/verify_https.sh << 'EOF'
#!/bin/bash

echo "Verifying all token logo URLs are HTTPS..."
echo ""

# Test native token logos
echo "Native Token Logos (chain-specific):"
for chain in ethereum base arbitrum polygon optimism; do
  url="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/trustwallet/assets/master/blockchains/${chain}/info/logo.png"
  status=$(curl -sI "$url" 2>&1 | grep "HTTP" | head -1 | awk '{print $2}')
  echo "  $chain: $status"
done

echo ""
echo "Symbol-based logos (cryptocurrency-icons):"
for symbol in eth usdc dai; do
  url="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/spothq/cryptocurrency-icons/master/128/color/${symbol}.png"
  status=$(curl -sI "$url" 2>&1 | grep "HTTP" | head -1 | awk '{print $2}')
  echo "  $symbol: $status"
done

echo ""
echo "TrustWallet token logos (Base USDC example):"
url="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/trustwallet/assets/master/blockchains/base/assets/0x833589fCD6eDb6E08f4c7C32D4f71b54bdA02913/logo.png"
status=$(curl -sI "$url" 2>&1 | grep "HTTP" | head -1 | awk '{print $2}')
echo "  Base USDC: $status"

echo ""
echo "✅ All URLs use HTTPS protocol"
EOF

chmod +x /tmp/verify_https.sh
/tmp/verify_https.sh
input.description: Verify all logo URLs are HTTPS and working

state.title:
cat > /tmp/verify_https.sh << 'EOF'
#!/bin/bash

echo "Verifying all token logo URLs are HTTPS..."
echo ""

# Test native token logos
echo "Native Token Logos (chain-specific):"
for chain in ethereum base arbitrum polygon optimism; do
  url="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/trustwallet/assets/master/blockchains/${chain}/info/logo.png"
  status=$(curl -sI "$url" 2>&1 | grep "HTTP" | head -1 | awk '{print $2}')
  echo "  $chain: $status"
done

echo ""
echo "Symbol-based logos (cryptocurrency-icons):"
for symbol in eth usdc dai; do
  url="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/spothq/cryptocurrency-icons/master/128/color/${symbol}.png"
  status=$(curl -sI "$url" 2>&1 | grep "HTTP" | head -1 | awk '{print $2}')
  echo "  $symbol: $status"
done

echo ""
echo "TrustWallet token logos (Base USDC example):"
url="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/trustwallet/assets/master/blockchains/base/assets/0x833589fCD6eDb6E08f4c7C32D4f71b54bdA02913/logo.png"
status=$(curl -sI "$url" 2>&1 | grep "HTTP" | head -1 | awk '{print $2}')
echo "  Base USDC: $status"

echo ""
echo "✅ All URLs use HTTPS protocol"
EOF

chmod +x /tmp/verify_https.sh
/tmp/verify_https.sh
